device: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition

key_findings.scaling_not_monotonic: Pythia 410M (6.15x) > 6.9B (2.12x). head_dim doubling (64->128) reduces norm_sep advantage.
key_findings.head_dim_hypothesis: INT4 quantizes 128 dims more gently than 64 dims at the same bit level, reducing the margin for norm separation to improve.
key_findings.kv_asymmetry_breaks_in_gqa: Qwen2-7B (GQA, 4 KV heads): V>K in 26/28 layers. Finding 3 does NOT hold for GQA.
key_findings.pca_scales_well: npca64: Pythia-6.9B +1.37, Qwen2-7B +0.41. PCA compression effective at 7B.
key_findings.qwen2_int4_too_aggressive: Qwen2-7B naive4 shows repetition, nsep4 shows multilingual artifacts. INT4 may be too aggressive for this model's KV structure.
